race.comment: DREAM ILLUSION (4) turned in a fine effort to win by 1.5 lengths at today's track and distance last start to maintain his good form of late. The engagement of Alex Hearn is a positive move. Well placed and there is no reason he cannot repeat the dose. LIM'S SARBACH (7) was out of the money two runs back then again missed the frame last start when he was always well out of his ground over 1400m at this track, beaten 3 lengths into fifth. Best figures measure up nicely. Sure to run well. WESTERN IMPACT (6) is usually thereabouts but finds it hard to win, with just three wins from 33 starts. Did a good job last start to finish third over 1400m at this track, beaten 2.5 lengths. In the right race and there is no reason he cannot get the major prize. ONLY US (11) returned from a break for the new stable and was on dirt for the first time when victorious over 1200m at this track, scoring by 0.9 lengths. Plenty of improvement to come and is one of the genuine hopes in the race.
